title: TREATMENT AND COUNSELING - 211info
text: SAFE JOURNEYS LLC TREATMENT AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides state-certified outpatient treatment for DUII and Substance Use Disorders (SUD), including relapse prevention and addictions counseling (problem gambling included). Also offers support for parenting skills, trauma, stress, anger management, life skills, and wellness coaching. Telehealth services available via audio or video conferencing. 18801 SW Martinazzi Avenue Suite 206 Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Age 21 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm by appointment only Email (503) 989-0991 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 989-0991 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Offers sliding scale fee and accepts Oregon Health Plan. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Hindi, Punjabi AREA SERVED: Benton, Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located close to I-5 and I-205, across from the Tualatin Public Library. On TriMet bus lines with stops across from the office. Close walk to the WES Tualatin train station. Services: Anger Management Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Gambling Disorder Counseling Life Skills Education Parenting Skills Classes Relapse Prevention Programs Stress Management Wellness Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAFE JOURNEYS LLC
